hero.mobileSubtitle: Memorix schedules your reviews with precision. Field maps your knowledge gaps from the graph. Two engines, one goal: maximize your score.
hero.desktopSubtitle: Memorix memory engine handles when to review. Field graph engine reveals where you're weak. Together they concentrate your limited study time where it matters most.

memorixDialog.title: Memorix × Field Dual AI Engine
memorixDialog.description: UniMind's learning system is powered by two complementary AI engines: Memorix manages memory timing, Field maps knowledge structure.
memorixDialog.p1: Memorix (Memory Engine): Continuously learns from your answering trajectory, dynamically fits your forgetting curve for each question, and computes the optimal review moment. Compared to fixed-interval methods, it delivers three advantages — question-level granularity, individualized parameter iteration, and prioritized targeting of borderline forgetting thresholds.
memorixDialog.p2: Field (Graph Diagnostic Engine): Takes the entire subject knowledge graph and infers your mastery of every knowledge point from a sparse set of test results. Answer 20 questions and get a heatmap of all 200 knowledge points — showing which chapters are solid, which concepts are weak, and which prerequisites are missing.
memorixDialog.p3: Together: Memorix finds the questions to review. Field finds the knowledge clusters to fix. Not just practicing individual items, but filling structural gaps in your understanding.

memorix.emptyCurve: Not enough review data yet. Complete a few training rounds and your personalized Memorix fit curve will appear here.
